category_title: Non-compliant students who knowingly disregard directives and persist in misbehavior
scenario_title: Refusal to take a seat during classroom instruction
minimal_context: The student is standing in the classroom while the teacher is attempting to start general instructional activities.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please take your seat so we can begin the classroom instruction.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Remains standing and knowingly disregards the verbal behavior control directive)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: I need you to go to your seat now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues to stand, showing persistence in continued misbehavior despite the attempt to control it)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Are you going to sit down?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Does not respond to the teacher's request within 20 seconds and still refuses to comply, persisting in the misbehavior)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please take your seat so we can begin the classroom instruction.

STUDENT: (Remains standing and knowingly disregards the verbal behavior control directive)

TUTOR: I need you to go to your seat now.

STUDENT: (Continues to stand, showing persistence in continued misbehavior despite the attempt to control it)

TUTOR: Are you going to sit down?

STUDENT: (Does not respond to the teacher's request within 20 seconds and still refuses to comply, persisting in the misbehavior)

task.content: General classroom activities and instructional time

context.social_setting: Classroom setting with other students present

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the teacher asks a student to take his or her seat
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: The student does not comply and does not respond to their teacher's request within 20 seconds
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Knowingly disregard a verbal or written behavior control directive
related_quotes: knowingly disregard a verbal or written behavior control directive
do not respond to their teacher’s request within 20 seconds

behavior_patterns.condition: After the teacher makes repeated attempts to gain compliance
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Student persistence in continued misbehavior and refusal to comply
